message:
fix: remove lock button, pin inside pill toggles unpin (#123)

Pin 📌 inside the pill = pinned (clicking pill unpins).
Pin 📌 outside the pill = not pinned (clicking pin icon pins).
Removed the separate 🔓 lock button entirely.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
